name: Camembert and Walnut Pate
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend Camembert in a food processor until smooth.
2. Gradually add cream cheese, processing until smooth after each addition.
3. Add lime juice and process until smooth.
4. Transfer the mixture to a bowl.
5. Mix in 2 tablespoons of finely chopped walnuts.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Spoon pate into two serving bowls.
8. Sprinkle additional chopped walnuts on top.
Serve with toasted baguette slices and crudites like endives and red pepper strips. If Camembert is very strong, increase the amount of cream cheese.
